heading: Built for Bulgarian HR teams
subheading: Three core capabilities to manage your employees, calculate salaries, and stay compliant with Bulgarian regulations.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.description: Complete employee directory with profiles, department organization, search, and filtering. Manage your team from a single dashboard with full Bulgarian and English support.

calculators.title: HR Calculators
calculators.description: Accurate salary calculations and employment vs freelancer cost comparisons using 2026 Bulgarian tax rates. Get instant net/gross breakdowns and social security contribution details.

compliance.title: Bulgarian Compliance
compliance.description: All tools and calculations follow current Bulgarian labor law, NRA guidelines, and social security regulations. Stay compliant without the guesswork.
